name: azure-iac-guardrail
description: Scan Terraform files against versioned Azure infrastructure controls.

commands.title: Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Terraform Files
Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Existing Terraform Plan
Azure IaC Guardrail: Create and Scan Local Terraform Plan

azureIacGuardrail.scanOnSave.description: Scan Terraform files against Azure controls when they are saved.

azureIacGuardrail.workspaceControlsPath.description: Workspace-relative folder containing additional JSON control files.

azureIacGuardrail.terraformPath.description: Terraform executable path used to create plans and convert binary plans to JSON.

azureIacGuardrail.initializeBeforePlan.description: Run terraform init in non-interactive mode before creating a local compliance plan. Disable when initialization is managed separately.

scripts.package: npm run check && npm run test && npm run compile && vsce package
